title: Schemathesis Configuration Structure
description: Document structure for a .schemathesis.yml configuration file.

structure.schema: Path or URL to OpenAPI/GraphQL schema file
structure.url: API base URL to test against
structure.max_response_time: Max allowed response time in ms
structure.hypothesis_max_examples: Number of test cases per operation (default: 100)
structure.stateful: none | links (follow OpenAPI Links for stateful testing)
structure.junit_xml: Path for JUnit XML report output

test_checks.not_a_server_error: Response status code must not be 5xx
test_checks.status_code_conformance: Response status must be in schema-declared codes
test_checks.response_schema_conformance: Response body must match schema for the status code
test_checks.content_type_conformance: Content-Type header must match schema declaration
test_checks.response_headers_conformance: Response headers must match schema declaration
